_comment: Minimal ENCODE ATAC-seq pipeline input for caper (paired-end FASTQ).

atac.title: example_atac_hg38_rep1
atac.description: Fictional paired-end ATAC-seq test input for local pipeline dry-run.

_field_docs.title: Run label shown in metadata and output folder naming.
_field_docs.genome_tsv: ENCODE genome resource table URL; must match target assembly.
_field_docs.paired_end: Set true for paired-end reads (R1/R2 arrays required).
_field_docs.fastqs_rep1_R1: Array of replicate 1 R1 FASTQ paths.
_field_docs.fastqs_rep1_R2: Array of replicate 1 R2 FASTQ paths.
_field_docs.enable_idr: Set true when >=2 biological replicates are provided.
_field_docs.nthreads: Maximum threads requested by workflow tasks.
